description: Style NoteThis updated closet essential tops our wish-list this season! For the that new slinky dress you just bought or to dress up an office ensemble, this is the go-to shoe. Stylish yet not over-the-top, this modestly heeled shoe is perfect to make the right impression.Heel: 3.5"Product DetailsSynthetic  shoe with a heel cup and a zipped closure for cushioned comfortLightly padded footbed designed on the toe areaStrap with a slightly elasticated patch across the ankleTPU outsole with heelBranding appliqued on the outsoleShoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
